description_long: This is a vintage-style round clock with a metallic, weathered casing that shows signs of age and patina. The front face is circular and features a white or light gray background with black Arabic numerals, some of which are slightly stylized and unevenly spaced. The clock face is cracked in several places, adding to its aged appearance, and it has three black hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The top of the clock has a prominent, faceted winding knob, suggesting it is a wind-up mechanical clock. The back is solid and metallic, with visible screws or rivets, and the sides are cylindrical and uniformly metallic. This object would likely be found as a decorative or functional piece in an urban environment, such as a home, office, or public space.
description: A vintage round metal clock with a cracked face, black hands, and a prominent winding knob on top. The casing is weathered and metallic, giving it an antique appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical, metallic body and the top winding knob, with no visible clock face.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the cracked white clock face, black hands, and stylized Arabic numerals, with the winding knob visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the metallic cylindrical body and winding knob, with no face details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid, weathered metallic back with visible screws or rivets, and the winding knob at the top.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with a cracked white background, black stylized Arabic numerals, and three black hands.
